---
title: "air_pass_pr10"
author: "Raahat"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---
```{r}


# Load library
library(forecast)

# Load AirPassengers dataset (already available in R)
data("AirPassengers")

# Convert to time series (already monthly, but assign to variable)
ap_ts <- AirPassengers

# Plot original data
plot(ap_ts,
     main = "Monthly Airline Passengers",
     xlab = "Year",
     ylab = "Number of Passengers (thousands)")

# Fit ARIMA model automatically
model <- auto.arima(ap_ts)

# Display model summary
summary(model)

# Forecast next 12 months
forecast_ap <- forecast(model, h = 12)

# Print forecast values
print(forecast_ap)

# Plot forecast
plot(forecast_ap,
     main = "12-Month Forecast of Airline Passengers",
     xlab = "Year",
     ylab = "Passengers (thousands)")
```
